# Dr. Aline Saade

> Dr. Aline Saade is a specialist endodontist and the founder and clinic manager of Dental Experts Center (DEC) in Abu Dhabi, UAE. DEC is JCI-accredited with a 4.9-star Google rating.

## Expertise
- Root canal treatment and retreatment
- Microscopic endodontics
- Apicoectomy (endodontic surgery)
- Dental trauma management
- Regenerative endodontics
- Calcified canal management
- Internal and external resorption

## Pages
- [About Dr. Aline](https://alinesaade.com/about/): Biography, career journey, and clinical background
- [Clinical Philosophy](https://alinesaade.com/about/philosophy/): Evidence-based treatment approach
- [Credentials](https://alinesaade.com/about/credentials/): Degrees, certifications, and professional memberships
- [Research & Whitepapers](https://alinesaade.com/research/): Published clinical research and case reports
- [Blog](https://alinesaade.com/blog/): Clinical insights, patient education, and industry commentary
- [Case Gallery](https://alinesaade.com/case-gallery/): Clinical endodontic cases with outcomes
- [For Referring Dentists](https://alinesaade.com/for-dentists/): Referral portal with case submission
- [When to Refer](https://alinesaade.com/for-dentists/when-to-refer/): Clinical referral guidelines for general practitioners
- [Patient Resources](https://alinesaade.com/patient-resources/): FAQ and care guides
- [Ask Dr. Aline](https://alinesaade.com/ask-dr-aline/): AI-powered endodontic Q&A assistant
- [Contact](https://alinesaade.com/contact/): Appointments and inquiries

## Clinic
- [Dental Experts Center](https://dentexp.com)
- Location: Das Tower, 20th Floor, Al Bateen Street, Abu Dhabi, UAE
- JCI Accredited
- 4.9-star Google rating
